channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Several potholes, 18th March
item.description:
Several potholes outside No9, No7 & No5 Salamanca Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Salamanca Road, Oakley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 18th March
item.description:
Outside No9 Salamanca Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Salamanca Road, Oakley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Continuos potholes, 17th March
item.description:
Just before junction and after in lane one and 2 constant potholes,suffice is DANGEROUS and disgusting!! Why is this like this the country is falling to bits! Shocking motorway surface and highly dangerous
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): M5, Hucclecote, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole close to 1 Mead Road, 17th March
item.description:
Pothole beginnkng of Mead Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Mead Road, Naunton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole outside 39 mead Road, 17th March
item.description:
Pothole outside 39 mead Road Getting worse
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 43, Mead Road, Naunton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No access for footpath, 17th March
item.description:
At the top of the field, there is a barbed wire fence and no access for the footpath. At the bottom of the hill, the path is obstructed by a slurry pit.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Witcombe Roman Villa, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cycle Barrier has been bent limiting access to wheelchair user/s, 17th March
item.description:
Opposite 164 Farmfield Road, on path which enters the public right of way leading to Campion Park and Azaelia Drive. The cycle barrier has some how been bent ( see photo ) and as a result wheelchair user unable to bend down low enough to pass under it. The other barriers in the area are OK, approx 1.2 - 1.3Mtr clearance needed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 164, Farmfield Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: 8 inches wide, shoe box depth and growing daily on curb edge of pavement outside residential gate, 17th March
item.description:
Godfrey House, The Reddings GL51 6RT Curb side of pavement. A small sink hole

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Reddings, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Extensive deep wide pothole about two car lengths, 17th March
item.description:
Deep wide pothole outside the greyhound pub. Dangerous when people try to avoid it as so close to the junction.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Greyhound Gardens, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Problem resolved 17 March, 17th March
item.description:
The damaged tree reported as hanging over the road has now been removed. All other reports for Newcourt Road Charlton Kings relate to this damaged tree overhanging the road. Therefore, all can now closed Cllr Steve Harvey Borough Councillor Charlton Park Ward CBC

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Newcourt Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Tree causing damage/obstruction to pavement or road

item.title: 8ft long very deep in places, 17th March
item.description:
On the junction for the property centre / house of grillz etc. Very deep and often unavoidable. Causes nightmare at commute when people try to avoid it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandstar Close, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Set of four pot holes very deep and unavoidable, 17th March
item.description:
In the traffic calming measure opposite the play ground. Been here for months.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandstar Close, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2ft long very deep pavement crack, 17th March
item.description:
Opposite blackwater way and next to the greyhound garden sign, just down from the memorial bench

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandstar Close, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Long series of potholes. Unavoidable., 17th March
item.description:
Just down from the memorial bench and black water way, opposite a sign for greyhound gardens. Just up from the water station.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandstar Close, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large area of potholes causing traffic to swerve around them endagering oncoming traffic, 17th March
item.description:
What3words locations below: ///noises.expand.charmingly ///mint.sends.flats
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Greenhills Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The man hole has sunk in the road and the sides are starting to break away. This causes our house to shake when vehicle run over it., 17th March
item.description:
What three words, ///retraced.barstool.gloom In the road, going out of cheltenham.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shurdington Road, Shurdington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large potholes which are unavoidable without endangering oncoming traffic., 17th March
item.description:
Several very large potholes in road. First at the junction of Beeches Road and Little Herberts Road. Three others along Beeches Road. All very dangerous as people are swerving around them causing near misses with oncoming traffic.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Beeches Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large potholes which are unavoidable without endangering oncoming traffic., 17th March
item.description:
Immediately after traffic lights on Moorend Road. What3words - ///bumpy.roof.video
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Moorend Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 17th March
item.description:
Give and take plus temporary footway closure 28 day please lift and relay x1 raised 900x600x20mm slabs (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 17th March
item.description:
Give and take plus temporary footway closure 28 day please lift and replace x1 broken sunken 900x600x20mm slab (FW Broken Slabs)
Report on FixMyStreet
